caption: A person's hands are seen manipulating a white and black box on a surface decorated with "CASEBREAKS" and "JASPYS" logos. In the first frame, the hand holds the box, which features the words "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" in red and white. A small picture-in-picture window in the corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves the box and begins to open it, pulling back a flap of cardboard. The background includes a red and white cup and a white surface with various logos, including "CASEBREAKS.com". The man in the inset window remains visible throughout, watching the process. The action focuses on the tactile process of unboxing a sports card product, moving from holding the box to peeling open the seal.
